args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions for CreateHandlersInterface with 1-10 handler overloads
- Neighbor files: src/helper/... (factory core), src/hono, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createApp and createHandlers methods for building Hono applications with custom initialization and handler combining.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Functions working with Context and RouterRoute types
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/utils/url, src/types
- Safe summary: Route helper functions provide runtime inspection of matched routes, path info, and base path context within handlers.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSContext, WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, UpgradeWebSocket
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces, WSContext class, upgradeWebSocket middleware factory
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper enables WebSocket upgrade with event handlers (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError) via defineWebSocketHelper.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: Cookie parsing and serialization utilities using parse/serialize functions
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie helper manages cookie reading from headers, signed cookie support, secure/__Host- prefixed cookies with generateCookie/setCookie functions.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Testing client generator using hc from client module
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono
- Safe summary: Testing helper creates test client instances for a Hono app with custom fetch implementation for request handling.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: Runtime detection function with navigator.userAgent checks
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Adapter helper provides env() function for accessing runtime-specific global environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly) with getRuntimeKey detection.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS template functions with template literal support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: CSS helper provides css/cx for class/style generation, keyframes for animations, and viewTransition for page transitions using classNameSlug customization.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, toHash, minify, rawCssString
- Reads as: CSS string builder with selector tracking and class name hashing
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index
- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities provide buildStyleString, class name generation via toHash, minification, and symbol-based interfaces (SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING).

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: fetch wrapper with hop-by-hop header removal and Connection header processing
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch for proxying with RFC 9110 compliance option, removes hop-by-hop headers, and handles strict Connection header validation.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Route inspection and console logging functions with colorization support
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Dev helper provides route inspection via inspectRoutes, formatted route display via showRoutes with optional verbose/color options, and router name detection.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML template rendering with escape handling
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper escapes template values and builds HtmlEscapedString with callback support via escapeToBuffer and stringBufferToString utilities.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile
- Reads as: Exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG helper exports core generation functions, context detection middleware, and SSG-related utilities for static site generation.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGOptions
- Reads as: Async generator for route content fetching and file saving with hook system
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/client/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSG core generates static pages by fetching routes with concurrency, saving content to files, supporting hooks before/after request/response and generation via plugins system.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities and route filtering functions
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utilities provide path joining, dynamic route detection via :/ or * segments, static route filtering for GET methods, and path traversal prevention via ensureWithinOutDir.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSGParams, AddedSSGDataRequest
- Reads as: Middleware and constants for SSG context detection and params injection
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware provides ssgParams for injecting dynamic params, isSSGContext flag check, and disableSSG/onlySSG guards for SSG-specific routes.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Re-exports from stream, sse, and text modules
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports core streaming functions: stream for base streaming, streamSSE for Server-Sent Events, and streamText for text responses.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
- Reads as: TransformStream-based streaming response with error handling
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Safe summary: Base streaming function creates ReadableStream response with TransformStream, handles errors via onError callback, and manages Bun compatibility for signal cleanup.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: SSE-specific streaming with writeSSE message method
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSE helper provides streamSSE with Transfer-Encoding chunked, Content-Type text/event-stream, and writeSSE method for sending data/event/id/retry fields.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Text-streaming wrapper using base stream with TEXT_PLAIN content type
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/context
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper sets Content-Type to TEXT_PLAIN with X-Content-Type-Options nosniff and Transfer-Encoding chunked before delegating to base stream.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Re-export from accepts.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper index exports the main accepts function for matching Accept headers against supported types with quality value sorting.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, parseAccept, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsConfig
- Reads as: Accept header parsing and matching with quality sorting
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accepts helper parses Accept headers via parseAccept, sorts by q value, and matches against supports array with default fallback via defaultMatch.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: Type re-exports from types.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper exports ConnInfo interface with remote NetAddrInfo containing address, port, transport, and addressType fields for connection inspection.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces for connection info and types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/context
- Safe summary: ConnInfo types define ConnInfo with remote NetAddrInfo (address, port, addressType, transport) and GetConnInfo helper type for Context.
